itemListElement.reviewBody:
My daughter loves her MRIS as she calls it !! We admitted her in Nursery and today she is in grade 4 .
MRIS sector-46 is for any parent who would like to send their children to a learning institution with an open learning environment, adaptive teaching methodology and focus on making learning fun and memorable.
Along with the studies, the school focuses on encouraging the child to develop other interests and skills as well. The teachers and administration have always been kind and supportive.

We would like to thank everyone in the MRIS team for their hard work and support !

It’s wonderful to see our daughter Amayra grow from a bud to a flower. Manav Rachna International School has helped in developing her character, talents and various skills, not only academically but also
in other extra curricular areas.
Amayra is excited every morning about going to school. She’s becoming more social and educated each day. We can see a boost in her confidence level,
Initially Amayra was not very comfortable conversing in English, but now we can see her confidently speaking to all age groups.
She has developed an interest in reading and has started reading on her own.
Big thanks to such caring and responsible teachers. Its only due to thier endless kindness, thoughtfulness and imagination,that
we can be at ease when she is at school knowing she is cared for, safe, and in a place that facilitates her future success.

MRIS-46 is the best school in Delhi NCR. Great school which not only pushes children in academics but also in extra-curricular activities. Has a great infrastructure. Teachers are highly supportive and co-operative. Special regards to my daughter's class teacher Utplakshi Ma'am. She is very kind and helpful teacher. MRIS also organize fun activities like Christmas carnival. School also appreciates students' effort by giving them scholar badges. Thank you team- MRIS.

We extend our heartfelt appreciation to the entire staff at MRIS46 School for their exceptional dedication and care towards our child's education and well-being. Over the years, from nursery to the grade 4, the school's commitment to academic excellence and holistic growth has left an indelible mark on our child's journey.
Equally commendable is the meticulous attention given to medical care. The school's medical team has exhibited unwavering vigilance, ensuring our child's health and safety while away from home.
This institution isn't just a school; it's a bank full of learning and care, and we are profoundly grateful to be part of this remarkable community. Our gratitude knows no bounds for the extraordinary efforts put forth by MRIS46 School in shaping our child's future and safeguarding their well-being.

My daughter loves it here!! We admitted her in toddlers and today she is in grade 9-a very fulfilling journey!! She has bloomed as a person with the right value system and a beautiful personality! This school is for any progressive parent who would like to send their children to a learning institution with an open learning environment, adaptive teaching methodology and focus on making learning fun and memorable. The teachers and staff along with students put a lot of thought, effort and creativity into what they do. Along with the studies, the school focuses on encouraging the child to develop interests and skills pertaining to art-music and sports at the same time. The administration has always been communicative, supports feedback and welcomes engagement with parents.
Today my daughter is an independent, social and knowledgeable 14 year old girl with lots of dreams and aspirations and we would credit the school for moulding her into the person she is today!!
